title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_describe
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_describe' MCP tool.

workspaceRoot.description: Repo path. Default: first MCP root / cwd.

tags.description: When true (default), pass --tags so lightweight tags are also considered.

match.description: Optional glob to restrict candidate tags (passed as --match). Safe glob subset only.

abbrev.description: Number of hex digits for the abbreviated SHA (passed as --abbrev=<n>).
